race.description: Ladies Of The Long Lunch Showcase Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: FLEE WITH ME (9) is a 22-start maiden but still looks the one to beat. Found 2150m on a seven-day back-up against Class 1 opposition too arduous last start. Far better placed back to the mile against maidens. This is her big chance to finally break through. ADAMANA (7) passed a few in the straight but was still beaten a long way last time out over this course and distance. Drops back from a Class 1 to a maiden so she should be far more competitive this time. CASTRO (1) made it eight minor placings from 12 career starts when he chimed in late to finish third recently over 1400m at this track. Is proven at this trip so with a bit of luck slotting in from a wide draw he should be about the money again. NOTHING FINER (4) returned to form with an eye-catcher last start over 1200m at this track, making up many lengths in the run home. Stepping up so sharply to the mile is the only query. LITLFELA (3) ran on well to clock in just behind CASTRO here last time. Hard to rule out.
